packageRules.description: Bundle all non-major Node/npm updates (web/app PWA + Cloudflare worker) into one PR.
Gate JS major upgrades behind manual dashboard approval (breaking changes; no JS build in CI).

DECISION 2026-07-04 (minh): digest-pinning for GitHub Actions is DEFERRED — team/repo too small to carry the SHA-churn review load; tag pins (@vN) suffice for now. Revisit when the repo gains external contributors or a compliance requirement. Group action bumps into one PR.
